tasks.label: Relay Server
tasks.command: @('C:\Dev\Copilot\Magentic2\env\.env.dev','C:\Dev\Copilot\Magentic2\env\.env.dev.user') | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | ForEach-Object { Get-Content $_ | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -and $_ -notmatch '^\s*#' -and $_ -match '=') { $k,$v = $_ -split '=',2; $k=$k.Trim(); $v=$v.Trim().Trim('\"'); if ($k) { Set-Item -Path "Env:$k" -Value $v } } } }; $env:CINODE_BASIC_TOKEN=$env:CINODE_API_KEY; $env:TRANSPORT='http'; $env:PORT='3001'; $env:NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED='0'; node 'C:\Dev\Copilot\flow-relay-mcp-server\dist\index.js'

tasks.label: Patch Tunnel URL
tasks.command: $url = (devtunnel list 2>&1 | Select-String '(https://[a-z0-9]+-3001\.[a-z]+\.devtunnels\.ms)').Matches[0].Value; (Get-Content env\.env.dev -Raw) -replace '(?m)^PA_APP_SERVER_URL=.*$', "PA_APP_SERVER_URL=$url" | Set-Content env\.env.dev -NoNewline; Write-Host "Patched .env.dev with $url" -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'Paste to Claude Code:' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host "Update PA_APP_SERVER_URL to $url in src/agent/env.tsp then rebuild" -ForegroundColor Yellow

tasks.label: Deploy Agent
tasks.command: npm run generate:env -- dev && npm run compile && npm run patch:pa-spec && npm run patch:plugin-auth && npm run patch:agent-version && atk provision --env dev 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath deploy.log
